# Copilot Instructions

These are my always-on instructions for GitHub Copilot.

## General Guidelines

- Write clean, readable, and maintainable code.
- Follow language-specific best practices and conventions.
- Include comments for complex logic.
- Prefer functional programming where appropriate.
- Ensure code is secure and handles edge cases.

## Code Style

- Use consistent indentation (4 spaces).
- Use descriptive variable and function names.
- Avoid magic numbers; use constants.
- Write unit tests for new functionality.

## Project-Specific Rules

- For this GildedRose refactoring kata, focus on improving code quality without changing behavior.
- Prioritize readability and extensibility.
